description_long: This is a modern wooden chair with a curved, dark-stained backrest and a slightly reclined profile. The backrest features a cut-out section at the lower center, providing both visual interest and ergonomic support. The seat is padded and upholstered in a dark fabric, offering comfort and a subtle contrast to the wood grain. Four tapered wooden legs provide stability, with a horizontal support bar connecting the rear legs for added strength. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban interiors such as cafes, waiting areas, or offices. The craftsmanship and materials suggest durability and a focus on both aesthetics and function.
description: A modern wooden chair with a curved backrest, dark padded seat, and four tapered legs, blending comfort and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved wooden backrest with a central cut-out and the padded seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the reclined backrest angle and the thickness of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and the connecting support bar between the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the backrest and seat.
